title: elaphoglossum campylolepium
intro: Elaphoglossum campylolepium, also known as the Campylolepium Elaphoglossum or Elaphoglossum, is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum campylolepium include treating various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin issues, as well as reducing inflammation and improving respiratory health. Elaphoglossum campylolepium is typically prepared as a tea by infusing the leaves in hot water or used as a poultice by mixing the plant material with water to form a paste.
